title: Julie's Spaghetti with Meat Sauce
ingredients: ½ cup dry red wine (non-alcoholic works great)
¼ teaspoon freshly ground black pepper
1 pound spaghetti, cooked al dente and drained
instructions: In a large heavy kettle, sauté onion and garlic in butter and olive oil until translucent.
Add beef, pork, and veal; cook over medium heat until browned.
Stir in bell pepper, mushrooms, tomato paste, tomatoes, Worcestershire, bitters, sugar, wine, salt, pepper, celery salt, bay leaves, and cayenne.
Simmer over low heat for 3 hours, stirring occasionally.
Divide spaghetti among warmed plates and top with sauce.
Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and serve immediately.
